meta.title: A Day in the Time Loop

start.title: The Alarm That Never Stops
start.text: The alarm blares at 7:12 AM. I know because I've heard it enough times to count the seconds between the snooze and the repeat. The coffee on the counter is always cold. Outside, the same bus brakes at the same corner.

street.title: Same Corner, Same Bus
street.text: The bus passes, the pigeon takes off, and a cyclist nearly clips the lamppost. Everything lines up like a rehearsal. If I want out, I need to break the rhythm.

watch.title: The Second Hand Stutters
watch.text: The watch skips backwards for a beat, then settles. Etched inside the case is a tiny phrase: 'Choose the moment you mean.'

market.title: A New Detail
market.text: At the market, one stall is new. The vendor smiles as if they were expecting me. That should be impossible, which means the loop is already cracking.

choices.text: Ask the vendor what they know

end.title: One Step Closer
end.text: The loop is still there, but it is no longer seamless. I can feel the shape of an exit now.
